message:
fix(contracts): validate evidence contract IDs in ContractCompliance and harden assertions

ContractCompliance::from_evidence had a correctness bug where evidence
targeting a different contract could make the current contract appear
compliant. Fix by filtering evidence by contract_id before computing
coverage.

Strengthen vendored contract verification assertions:
- v09 (channel contract): assert zero tokio::sync::mpsc/watch imports
  in vendored files (was informational count)
- v26 (drift contract): assert zero direct tokio imports in vendored
  files (was informational logging)
- Add v22b verification test for contract-ID mismatch rejection

Add tests across all layers: unit, proptest, integration, and
verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
